description_for_human: Banking & Payment Gateway API for Cameroon — COBAC compliant. Access accounts, payments, credit scores, mobile money, virtual cards, merchant tools, and more.
description_for_model: Access Cameroon banking and payment services via the Kang Open Banking platform (API v4.29.3). Capabilities include: AISP (account information), PISP (payment initiation), Payment Gateway (charges via MoMo/Card/USSD/PayPal, payouts, refunds, disputes, settlements, payment links, subscriptions, split payments), Funding Intents, POS Commerce, credit scoring (CrediQ), mobile money (MTN, Orange Money), virtual cards, loans, savings, double-entry ledger, merchant KYB, webhooks (24 event types), KYC/compliance, ISO 20022 & SWIFT, IBAN/BIC/RIB validation, Cameroon bank directory, WooCommerce, escrow & treasury, and consumer tools (Piggy Bank, Njangi). XAF currency native. OAuth 2.0 with PKCE, mTLS, FAPI 1.0 Advanced. Operational guides: rate limits at /developer/api-reference/rate-limits, idempotency keys at /developer/api-reference/idempotency, cursor pagination at /developer/api-reference/pagination, 7-attempt webhook retry at /developer/api-reference/webhook-retry, OAuth2 token lifecycle at /developer/api-reference/token-lifecycle. Official SDKs: Node (@kangopenbanking/sdk on npm), Python (kangopenbanking on PyPI), PHP (kangopenbanking/sdk on Packagist), Go (github.com/kangopenbanking/sdk-go). Postman collection at /developer/guides/postman. Full AI-crawler index at /llms.txt.
